options.content:
## Sign-in Analysis

### This report provides detailed sign-in information for your applications. Azure Active Directory Authentication Library (ADAL) has been deprecated. Use the Microsoft Authentication Library (MSAL) to avoid putting your app's security at risk. If you have existing applications that use ADAL, be sure to migrate them to MSAL. [Learn more about the migration steps](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/identity-platform/msal-migration).

panels.description: Total count of ADAL sign-ins across all apps

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let nonInteractive = AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | where Key contains "AD App"
    | where Value contains "ADAL"
    | extend details = split(Value, " ")
    | extend Version = strcat(details[3]," ",details[4])
    | project TimeGenerated, AppDisplayName, AppId, Version, IPAddress, Identity, ResultType;
let interactive = SigninLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | where Key contains "AD App"
    | where Value contains "ADAL"
    | extend details = split(Value, " ")
    | extend Version = strcat(details[3]," ",details[4])
    | project TimeGenerated, AppDisplayName, AppId, Version, IPAddress, Identity, ResultType;
let spLogIns = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | where Key contains "AD App"
    | where Value contains "ADAL"
    | extend details = split(Value, " ")
    | extend Version = strcat(details[3], " ", details[4])
    | project TimeGenerated, ServicePrincipalName, AppId, Version, IPAddress, Identity, ResultType;
union interactive, nonInteractive, spLogIns
| summarize Count = count()

panels.title: ADAL Sign-ins

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let nonInteractive = AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | where Key contains "AD App"
    | where Value contains "ADAL"
    | project AppId;
let interactive = SigninLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | where Key contains "AD App"
    | where Value contains "ADAL"
    | project AppId;
let spLogIns = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | where Key contains "AD App"
    | where Value contains "ADAL"
    | project AppId;
union interactive, nonInteractive, spLogIns
| summarize UniqueApps = dcount(AppId)

let nonInteractive = AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | where Key contains "AD App"
    | where Value contains "ADAL"
    | project ResultType;
let interactive = SigninLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | where Key contains "AD App"
    | where Value contains "ADAL"
    | project ResultType;
let spLogIns = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | where Key contains "AD App"
    | where Value contains "ADAL"
    | project ResultType;
union interactive, nonInteractive, spLogIns
| where ResultType == 0
| summarize Count = count()

let nonInteractive = AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | where Key contains "AD App"
    | where Value contains "ADAL"
    | project ResultType;
let interactive = SigninLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | where Key contains "AD App"
    | where Value contains "ADAL"
    | project ResultType;
let spLogIns = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | where Key contains "AD App"
    | where Value contains "ADAL"
    | project ResultType;
union interactive, nonInteractive, spLogIns
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize Count = count()

panels.description: Apps using Active Directory Authentication Libraries (ADAL)

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let nonInteractive = AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
|mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    |extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    |extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    |where Key contains "AD App"
    |where Value contains "ADAL"
    |extend details = split(Value, " ")
    |extend Version = strcat(details[3]," ",details[4])
|project TimeGenerated,
['App Name'] = AppDisplayName,
['App ID'] = AppId, 
 ['ADAL Version'] = Version,
['IP Address'] = IPAddress,
['Identity type'] = Identity
|summarize ['Sign-in Count'] = dcount(TimeGenerated, 4) by ['App Name'], ['App ID'], ['ADAL Version'], ['IP Address'],['Identity type'];
let interactive = SigninLogs
|mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    |extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    |extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    |where Key contains "AD App"
    |where Value contains "ADAL"
    |extend details = split(Value, " ")
    |extend Version = strcat(details[3]," ",details[4])
|project TimeGenerated, 
['App Name'] = AppDisplayName, 
['App ID'] = AppId, 
['ADAL Version'] = Version,
['IP Address'] = IPAddress,
['Identity type'] = Identity
|summarize ['Sign-in Count'] = dcount(TimeGenerated, 4) by ['App Name'], ['App ID'], ['ADAL Version'], ['IP Address'],['Identity type'];
let spLogIns = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
     | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
     | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
     | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
     | where Key contains "AD App"
     | where Value contains "ADAL"
     | extend details = split(Value, " ")
     | extend Version = strcat(details[3], " ", details[4])
     | project TimeGenerated,
         ['App Name'] = ServicePrincipalName,
         ['App ID'] = AppId,
         ['ADAL Version'] = Version,
         ['IP Address'] = IPAddress,
         ['Identity type'] = Identity
     | summarize ['Sign-in Count'] = dcount(TimeGenerated, 4) by ['App Name'], ['App ID'], ['ADAL Version'],['IP Address'],['Identity type'];
union interactive, nonInteractive,spLogIns

panels.title: Apps using Active Directory Authentication Libraries (ADAL)

options.content:
### ALL Sign-in Data

💡 _Use the filters at the top to drill down by Apps and Users_

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let ALLnonInteractive = AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | extend details = split(Value, " ")
    | extend Version = strcat(details[3], " ", details[4])
    | project TimeGenerated, AppDisplayName, AppId;
let ALLinteractive = SigninLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | extend details = split(Value, " ")
    | extend Version = strcat(details[3], " ", details[4])
    | project TimeGenerated, AppDisplayName, AppId, ResultType;
let AllSPLogIn = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | mv-expand ParsedFields=parse_json(AuthenticationProcessingDetails)
    | extend Key = ParsedFields.key
    | extend Value = ParsedFields.value
    | extend details = split(Value, " ")
    | extend Version = strcat(details[3], " ", details[4])
    | project TimeGenerated, ServicePrincipalName, AppId, ResultType;
union ALLnonInteractive, ALLinteractive, AllSPLogIn
| where AppDisplayName in ($Apps) or '*' in ($Apps)
| summarize Count = count()

let ALLinteractive = SigninLogs
    | project ResultType;
let AllSPLogIn = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | project ResultType;
union ALLinteractive, AllSPLogIn
| where ResultType == 0
| summarize Count = count()

let ALLinteractive = SigninLogs
    | project ResultType;
let AllSPLogIn = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | project ResultType;
union ALLinteractive, AllSPLogIn
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize Count = count()

panels.description: Sign-ins by location with hierarchical country/city view

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let data = SigninLogs
| extend AppDisplayName = iff(AppDisplayName == '', 'Unknown', AppDisplayName)
|where AppDisplayName in ($Apps) or '*' in ($Apps)
|where UserDisplayName in ($Users) or '*' in ($Users)
| extend Country = iff(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion == '', 'Unknown country', tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion))
| extend City = iff(LocationDetails.city == '', 'Unknown city', tostring(LocationDetails.city))
| extend errorCode = Status.errorCode
| extend SigninStatus = case(errorCode == 0, "Success", errorCode == 50058, "Pending user action",errorCode == 50140, "Pending user action", errorCode == 51006, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50059, "Pending user action",errorCode == 65001, "Pending user action", errorCode == 52004, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50055, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50144, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50072, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50074, "Pending user action", errorCode == 16000, "Pending user action", errorCode == 16001, "Pending user action", errorCode == 16003, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50127, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50125, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50129, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50143, "Pending user action", errorCode == 81010, "Pending user action", errorCode == 81014, "Pending user action", errorCode == 81012 ,"Pending user action", "Failure");
data
| summarize TotalCount = count(), SuccessCount = countif(SigninStatus == "Success"), FailureCount = countif(SigninStatus == "Failure"), InterruptCount = countif(SigninStatus == "Pending user action") by Country, City
| order by TotalCount desc, Country asc
| project Country, City, ['Sign-in Count'] = TotalCount, ['Success Count'] = SuccessCount, ['Failure Count'] = FailureCount, ['Interrupt Count'] = InterruptCount, ['Success Rate'] = 1.0 * SuccessCount / TotalCount

panels.title: Sign-ins by Location

azureLogAnalytics.query:
SigninLogs
|extend ParseLocation = parse_json(LocationDetails)
| extend Country = iff(ParseLocation.countryOrRegion == '', 'Unknown', tostring(ParseLocation.countryOrRegion))
| extend City = iff(ParseLocation.city == '', 'Unknown', tostring(ParseLocation.city))
| extend State = iff(ParseLocation.state == '', 'Unknown', tostring(ParseLocation.state))
| extend GeoCoord = ParseLocation.geoCoordinates
| extend ParseGeoCoord = parse_json(GeoCoord)
| extend Latitude = tostring(ParseGeoCoord.latitude)
| extend Longitude = tostring(ParseGeoCoord.longitude)
| project UserDisplayName, Location, Latitude, Longitude, City, State, Country
| summarize Count = count() by City, State, Country, Latitude, Longitude

panels.description: Sign-ins by device OS and browser

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let data = SigninLogs
|where AppDisplayName in ($Apps) or '*' in ($Apps)
|where UserDisplayName in ($Users) or '*' in ($Users)
| extend errorCode = Status.errorCode
| extend SigninStatus = case(errorCode == 0, "Success", errorCode == 50058, "Pending user action",errorCode == 50140, "Pending user action", errorCode == 51006, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50059, "Pending user action",errorCode == 65001, "Pending user action", errorCode == 52004, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50055, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50144, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50072, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50074, "Pending user action", errorCode == 16000, "Pending user action", errorCode == 16001, "Pending user action", errorCode == 16003, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50127, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50125, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50129, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50143, "Pending user action", errorCode == 81010, "Pending user action", errorCode == 81014, "Pending user action", errorCode == 81012 ,"Pending user action", "Failure");
data
| summarize TotalCount = count(), SuccessCount = countif(SigninStatus == "Success"), FailureCount = countif(SigninStatus == "Failure"), InterruptCount = countif(SigninStatus == "Pending user action") by Os = tostring(DeviceDetail.operatingSystem), Browser = tostring(DeviceDetail.browser)
| order by TotalCount desc, Os asc
| project Os, Browser, ['Sign-in Count'] = TotalCount, ['Success Count'] = SuccessCount, ['Failure Count'] = FailureCount, ['Interrupt Count'] = InterruptCount, ['Success Rate'] = 1.0 * SuccessCount / TotalCount

panels.title: Sign-ins by Device

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let data = SigninLogs
|where AppDisplayName in ($Apps) or '*' in ($Apps)
|where UserDisplayName in ($Users) or '*' in ($Users)
| extend errorCode = Status.errorCode
| extend SigninStatus = case(errorCode == 0, "Success", errorCode == 50058, "Pending user action",errorCode == 50140, "Pending user action", errorCode == 51006, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50059, "Pending user action",errorCode == 65001, "Pending user action", errorCode == 52004, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50055, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50144, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50072, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50074, "Pending user action", errorCode == 16000, "Pending user action", errorCode == 16001, "Pending user action", errorCode == 16003, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50127, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50125, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50129, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50143, "Pending user action", errorCode == 81010, "Pending user action", errorCode == 81014, "Pending user action", errorCode == 81012 ,"Pending user action", "Failure");
data
| where IPAddress has ":"
| summarize TotalCount = count(), SuccessCount = countif(SigninStatus == "Success"), FailureCount = countif(SigninStatus == "Failure"), InterruptCount = countif(SigninStatus == "Pending user action") by IPAddress
| order by TotalCount desc, IPAddress asc
| project IPAddress, ['Sign-in Count'] = TotalCount, ['Success Count'] = SuccessCount, ['Failure Count'] = FailureCount, ['Interrupt Count'] = InterruptCount, ['Success Rate'] = 1.0 * SuccessCount / TotalCount

let data = SigninLogs
|where AppDisplayName in ($Apps) or '*' in ($Apps)
|where UserDisplayName in ($Users) or '*' in ($Users)
| extend errorCode = Status.errorCode
| extend SigninStatus = case(errorCode == 0, "Success", errorCode == 50058, "Pending user action",errorCode == 50140, "Pending user action", errorCode == 51006, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50059, "Pending user action",errorCode == 65001, "Pending user action", errorCode == 52004, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50055, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50144, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50072, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50074, "Pending user action", errorCode == 16000, "Pending user action", errorCode == 16001, "Pending user action", errorCode == 16003, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50127, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50125, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50129, "Pending user action", errorCode == 50143, "Pending user action", errorCode == 81010, "Pending user action", errorCode == 81014, "Pending user action", errorCode == 81012 ,"Pending user action", "Failure")
| extend IPAddress
| where IPAddress has ":";
data
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| top 200 by TimeGenerated desc
| extend TimeFromNow = now() - TimeGenerated
| extend TimeAgo = strcat(case(TimeFromNow < 2m, strcat(toint(TimeFromNow / 1m), ' seconds'), TimeFromNow < 2h, strcat(toint(TimeFromNow / 1m), ' minutes'), TimeFromNow < 2d, strcat(toint(TimeFromNow / 1h), ' hours'), strcat(toint(TimeFromNow / 1d), ' days')), ' ago')
| project User = UserDisplayName, ['Sign-in Status'] = SigninStatus, ['Sign-in Time'] = TimeAgo, App = AppDisplayName, ['Error code'] = errorCode, ['Result type'] = ResultType, ['IPv6 Address'] = IPAddress, ['Time generated'] = TimeGenerated, ['User principal name'] = UserPrincipalName

SigninLogs
| summarize Count = count() by AppDisplayName
| order by Count desc, AppDisplayName asc
| project AppDisplayName

SigninLogs
| where AppDisplayName in ($Apps) or '*' in ($Apps)
| summarize Count = count() by UserDisplayName
| order by Count desc, UserDisplayName asc
| project UserDisplayName
